message:
feat(sql): add batch code generator for @logic_table GPU/SIMD dispatch

Adds batch_codegen.zig for generating optimized batch processing functions:
- BatchOp enum for cosine_sim, l2_distance, dot_product, arithmetic ops
- BatchCodeGen that analyzes SQL AST and generates Zig code
- Auto-dispatch to Metal GPU on Apple Silicon, SIMD fallback elsewhere
- detectBatchOp for mapping function names to batch operations

Example output:
```zig
pub fn score_batch(query: []const f32, vectors: []const f32, dim: usize, out: []f32) void {
    metal.gpuCosineSimilarityBatch(query, vectors, dim, out);
}
```
